_note: This is the seed template for .squad/roster.json. The single role below shows the schema — DELETE THIS ROLE when squad-role generates your real roles. The _note field is documentation only and is dropped on the next write by squad-roster. Fields prefixed with _ are reserved for documentation and ignored by the squad-roster skill.

roles._comment: EXAMPLE ROLE — your roles get generated here by /cheeky-squad-os:squad-role. Delete this entry (or wait — squad-role overwrites the file when it adds the first real role). This example is for schema reference only; active is false so squad-spawn will skip it.
roles.name: example-role-delete-me
roles.purpose: One sentence describing what this role does. Action-first. Specific artifact.
